summary: ai-chat-helper exfiltrates host information to hardcoded attacker endpoint
details: The package ships collect.js, which imports child_process, os, fs, http, and https, gathers host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and probes filesystem paths via fs.existsSync, then POSTs the collected data to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is unrelated to any documented purpose of an 'ai-chat-helper' package and matches the canonical credential/host-information exfiltration shape: system reconnaissance via child_process + os + fs, paired with an outbound POST to an attacker-controlled host over plaintext HTTP. Installing or loading this package causes installer host data to be sent to that endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
